title: Positive flow: Add a person successfully
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Add person' button. | Enter a name for the person in the input field. | Click on the 'FINISH' button.
expected_result: The app should display a confirmation message indicating the person has been added successfully. | The 'People' screen should show the newly added person.

title: Negative flow: Add person without entering a name
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Add person' button. | Click on the 'FINISH' button without entering a name.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a name is required.

title: Negative flow: Click 'FINISH' without adding a person
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'FINISH' button without adding a person.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a person needs to be added.

title: Negative flow: Click 'Cancel' without adding a person
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Cancel' button without adding a person.
expected_result: The app should return to the previous screen without adding a person.

title: Negative flow: Click 'FINISH' with invalid input
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Add person' button. | Enter an invalid name (e.g., a number) in the input field. | Click on the 'FINISH' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the name is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Click 'FINISH' with empty input
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Add person' button. | Enter an empty name in the input field. | Click on the 'FINISH' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the name is required.

title: Negative flow: Click 'FINISH' with special characters
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Add person' button. | Enter a name with special characters in the input field. | Click on the 'FINISH' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the name is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Click 'FINISH' with too many characters
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'People' screen. | Click on the 'Add person' button. | Enter a name with too many characters in the input field. | Click on the 'FINISH' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the name is too long.
